author_rating_explanation: The last author (Negar Mehr) is affiliated with the University of California, Berkeley, which is explicitly listed as a top US AI school in the 8-9 band. The first author's listed affiliation appears to be co-author names rather than an institution, but the verified Berkeley affiliation of the last author supports the 8-9 band rating.
